scripts.docker:infra: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml up --build mysql minio minio-init
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api ruff check apps/api/app apps/api/tests apps/api/migrations scripts
scripts.security:api: uv export --project apps/api --extra dev --format requirements.txt --no-hashes --no-header --no-annotate -o /tmp/makershub-api-requirements.txt >/dev/null && uvx pip-audit -r /tmp/makershub-api-requirements.txt --progress-spinner off
scripts.security: pnpm security:secrets && pnpm security:node && pnpm security:api
scripts.check: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r build && pnpm lint:api && pnpm test:api
